subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Forgiver of sins and Accepter of repentance, O All-Merciful in this world and the next, verily Thy servant hath naught [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا غافر الذنب و یا قابل التوب یا رحمن الدنیا و الاخره ان العبد لیس له
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant
